heading: Definitions
label: 913 Definitions
notes: References in TextThe date of enactment of this paragraph, referred to in par. (3)(B), is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 110–246June 18, 2008
Codificationand made identical amendments to this section. The amendments by were repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Amendments2008—, amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “As used in this chapter the term ‘rural area’, except as provided in , shall be deemed to mean any area of the United States not included within the boundaries of any urban area, as defined by the Bureau of the Census, and such term shall be deemed to include both the farm and nonfarm population thereof; the term ‘farm’ shall be deemed to mean a farm as defined in the publications of the Bureau of the Census; the term ‘person’ shall be deemed to mean any natural person, firm, corporation, or association; the term ‘Territory’ shall be deemed to include any insular possession of the United States; and the term ‘Secretary’ shall be deemed to mean the Secretary of Agriculture.”Pub. L. 110–246, § 6104section 924(b) of this title1994— inserted before period at end “; and the term ‘Secretary’ shall be deemed to mean the Secretary of Agriculture”.Pub. L. 103–3541993— inserted “, except as provided in ,” before “shall be deemed to mean” and substituted “urban area, as defined by the Bureau of the Census” for “city, village, or borough having a population in excess of fifteen hundred inhabitants,”.Pub. L. 103–129section 924(b) of this title1949—Act , inserted “title I,” in credit of act .Oct. 28, 1949May 20, 1936

children.heading: Farm
children.label: 1 Farm
children.text: The term “farm” means a farm, as defined by the Bureau of the Census.

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 2 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in .section 5304 of title 25

children.label: A
children.text: any area described in ; andsection 1991(a)(13)(C) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: any area within a service area of a borrower for which a borrower has an outstanding loan made under subchapters I through V as of the date of enactment of this paragraph.

children.heading: Territory
children.label: 4 Territory
children.text: The term “territory” includes any insular possession of the United States.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
